summary: Cavallo sponsors the Great Britain TREC team at the 2012 World Championships in Mafra, Portugal, providing saddle pads for proper saddle fit.
Essay by Joe Camp on natural horsemanship, citing Ray Hunt and Tom Dorrance, arguing relationships with horses should center on the horse's perspective.
Customer testimonial from Jerry Lutker about Cavallo Simple hoof boots staying on through mud and creeks for a foundered, tenderfooted horse.
Customer testimonial from Sophie Moreillon in Switzerland praising Cavallo saddle pads for western and baroque riding on a flat-backed PRE horse.
Customer testimonial about Rocky wearing Cavallo Sport hoof boots as a healthy alternative to metal shoes recommended by the farrier.
Customer testimonial from Christina about using Cavallo Simple hoof boots 24/7 to protect an off-track Thoroughbred's thin hoof walls and save on farrier fees.
Event announcement for Cavallo president Carole Herder speaking on barefoot horse care at Equitana in Melbourne, with her bio and product background.
Holiday notice that the Cavallo office is closed Dec 22 to Jan 7, with online orders still processed and a support phone number.
Customer photo and note from Starr C. about Sport hoof boots in the Charlotte NC Carousel Christmas parade representing the KidsRein therapeutic riding program.
Recap of Carole Herder's barefoot-program presentation at the Northwest Horse Fair & Expo in Albany, Oregon, including show highlights.
Cavallo highlights its sponsorship of the A Home for Every Horse rescue program and lists upcoming 2013 events like Rolex Kentucky and Jersey Fresh.
Customer testimonial from Laurie about using Cavallo Sport boots on mounted patrol in Rancho Cuyamaca State Park over rocky, snowy, and wet terrain.
